expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。 [宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[板厚] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] are total measurements. [BoardThick] is the thickness of the top, bottom, and side boards. [BackBoardThick] is the thickness of the backboard.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan. [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi. [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total. [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi. [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể. [BoardThick] là độ dày của tấm trên, dưới và bên. [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của tấm gỗ mặt sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay mga kabuuang sukat. Ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng itaas, ibaba, at gilid na mga tabla. Ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng tabla sa likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အံဆွဲအတွက် ပြားအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [အကျယ်], [အမြင့်], [အနက်] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်သည်။ [BoardThick] သည် ထိပ်, အောက်, နှင့်စာဘက်ပြားများ၏အထူမျှမဖြစ်သည်။ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံပြား၏အထူမျှမဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដាប់ធ្វើដំបងសម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាវិមាត្រសរុប។ [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃថ្នាំងលើ ក្រោម និងចំហៀង។ [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃថ្នល់ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນການວັດລວມ [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງບອດທີ່ດ້ານເທິງ, ດ້ານລຸ່ມ, ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງບອດຂ້າງຫລັງ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板材サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法です。[BoardThick]は上部、下部、および側面板の厚さです。[BackBoardThick]は背面板の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 크기입니다. [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단, 측면 보드의 두께입니다. [BackBoardThick]는 뒷판 보드의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales. [BoardThick] es el grosor de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral. [BackBoardThick] es el grosor de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont des mesures totales. [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux. [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße. [BoardThick] ist die Dicke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten. [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: एक कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है। [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры. [BoardThick] — толщина верхних, нижних и боковых досок. [BackBoardThick] — толщина задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
